## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm check-types`, `pnpm build` pass
- [ ] `pnpm test` and `pnpm test:e2e` pass
- [ ] `pnpm audit` is clean (or new advisories are explained)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the stack changed (README / CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] New shared code lives in the right `@repo/*` package, extracted from real usage (not a speculative stub)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, or areas needing a closer look.
